app.name: Tekton CLI
app.one_liner: A cross-platform command-line interface for interacting with Tekton CI/CD pipelines.

screens.name: Installation Guide
screens.purpose: Provides platform-specific instructions for installing the tkn binary.

rust_commands.name: install_tkn
rust_commands.purpose: Downloads and installs the appropriate tkn binary for the user's operating system.

mvp_plan: week 1: Validate installation paths per OS
acceptance_tests: Patch releases addressing CVEs are correctly associated with version metadata.
User can download and install tkn on Linux using provided tarball URL.
User can download and install tkn on Windows using PowerShell script from README.
